info.name: Flux — Master API Key (Brad)
info.description:
Automated request package for the platform master API key (task 868k16r8f).

The master key lets the designated operator (Brad) call the API on behalf of any customer.

How to use:
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable for the target environment (dev/staging).
2. Log in as Brad in the app, copy your access token into the `jwtToken` variable.
3. Run `Management > Rotate (create) master key` once — the test script auto-saves the returned secret into the `masterKey` variable (shown only once).
4. Set `targetSpaceId` to the customer's space id you want to act as.
5. Run any request under `Impersonation` — they send the master key in the `api-key` header plus `x-flux-act-as-space` to run as that customer. Omit the act-as header to run as Brad himself.

Every master-key call is audited server-side (operator, target, method, path, status, ip), including rejected attempts.

item.name: Management (Brad, JWT session)
item.description: Create/rotate and inspect the key. Requires Brad's JWT; guarded so only the owner email passes.

exec: console.log('Saved masterKey to collection variables (shown only once).');

request.description: Creates or rotates the master key and returns `{ "apiKey": "FLUX_MASTER_..." }` exactly once. Rotating invalidates the previous key. The test script stores the secret in the `masterKey` variable.
Returns status only (never the secret): `{ exists, prefix, lastRotatedAt, isActive }`.

item.name: Impersonation (master key)
item.description: Programmatic calls using the master key. Add `x-flux-act-as-space` to run as that space's owner; omit it to run as Brad.

item.name: List a customer's agents (act as space)

request.description: Runs as the target space's owner and returns that customer's agents/flows.

item.name: List a customer's folders (act as space)
Create a flow for a customer (act as space)

request.description: Creates a flow/agent inside the target customer's space. The customer is chosen by `x-flux-act-as-space`; leave `spaceId` out of the body to use that space's default folder.

item.name: List agents as Brad himself (no impersonation)

request.description: Without the `x-flux-act-as-space` header the master key authenticates as Brad's own account.
